title: Vanilla Coins
description: Adds money into Minecraft, Including counterfeit money.
body:
Vanilla Friendly

Adds coins into minecraft with recipe's that prevent farming.

There is also a way to remove coins from the world, to prevent overcirculation.

Also has counterfeit money. :D

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73f0bbab904daa2ccd0b9985d6d4abfebb7069ca.png)
